content:
💡 web-check | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Website analysis for security, optimization, and intelligence gathering.
✨ Key Features: • IP info • SSL chain • DNS records • Cookies • Headers
📖 Summary: Web-Check is a comprehensive OSINT tool written in TypeScript that analyzes websites to provide insights into their inner workings. It helps users understand, optimize, and secure their sites by uncovering potential attack vectors, analyzing server architecture, and identifying used technologies.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
